---
title: "Home"
listing:
  contents:
    - "*.qmd"
    - "*.Rmd"
    - "*.ipynb"
  exclude:
    filename:
      - "index.qmd"
      - "about.qmd"
      - "license.qmd"
  type: table
  fields: [title, date, description]
  sort: "date desc"
  sort-ui: true
  filter-ui: true
---

Welcome to your Quarto project!

Below are all notebooks (`.qmd`, `.Rmd`, `.ipynb`) in the `analysis/` directory. This
table is generated natively by Quarto from each notebook's YAML front matter (`title`,
`date`, `description`) — no R or Python required to render this page.
